product_overview: SiteFlow is a mobile-first, AI-assisted logistics web app for on-site delivery intake, document tracking, and manager dashboards. It uses a PIN login, camera-first delivery input, Gemini AI for document extraction, and a role-based dashboard (Admin / Manager / Unloader).
core_goals: Provide a fast, phone-first delivery intake flow for unloaders using a 4-digit PIN and camera capture.
Give managers and admins a real-time dashboard to identify missing documents, material gaps, and delivery issues.
Use AI (Gemini) to auto-extract document data, build a site material catalog, and provide a natural-language AI chat for queries.
Optimize file storage by compressing delivery photos after AI verification and enabling easy export/backup of delivery packages.
Maintain optimistic, responsive UX (instant resolves, skeleton loaders, role-based views) while ensuring server reconciliation and error recovery.

features.name: User Login (4-digit PIN)
features.description: Simple PIN-based authentication for all roles (Admin, Manager, Unloader). Users enter a 4-digit PIN on the public login page and are redirected to their role-appropriate dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter 4-digit PIN -> Click Sign In button -> Redirected to /dashboard (admin) or /unloader (unloader) or /manager (manager)
Navigate to / -> Enter incorrect 4-digit PIN -> Click Sign In button -> See error shake animation on invalid PIN -> Remain on /

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Tabs
features.description: Admin dashboard with three primary tabs (Action Center, Deliveries, Materials) allowing admins to switch contexts quickly and view aggregated data.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click on Action Center tab -> See Action Center content and stats cards
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click on Deliveries tab -> See DeliveryFeed content (skeleton loader while loading) -> See deliveries list
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click on Materials tab -> See MaterialProgress content
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click on Deliveries tab -> See skeleton loader -> See error message 'Unable to load deliveries' (network/API failure) -> Offer retry button

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Missing Documents (Optimistic Resolve)
features.description: Track missing shipment documents (CMR/TAD/DN). Admins can resolve missing-document flags; the UI removes the item immediately (optimistic) while backend confirms resolution.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Locate MissingDocsTracker -> Click Resolve button on a missing document -> Item animates out of the list immediately (optimistic UI) -> Background call POST /api/dashboard/resolve-doc succeeds -> Item remains resolved

Navigate to /dashboard -> Locate MissingDocsTracker -> Click Resolve button on a missing document -> Item animates out of the list immediately (optimistic UI) -> Background call POST /api/dashboard/resolve-doc fails -> Item returns to list and show error 'Unable to resolve, try again'

features.name: Admin Dashboard - AI Chat Assistant
features.description: AI chat panel on the dashboard that accepts natural-language queries, sends them to Gemini, and returns concise answers anchored to the database.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click AI chat toggle button -> Type message into input ('How many pipes arrived this month?') -> Click Send button -> See AI response message in chat

Navigate to /dashboard -> Click AI chat toggle button -> Type message into input -> Click Send button -> System calls POST /api/ai/chat -> Receive error from API -> Show error 'AI unavailable, please try again' and allow retry

features.name: Unloader Home (Gamified Intake)
features.description: Unloader role home screen: progress, gamification elements, and 'Log New Delivery' that opens a stepper for camera capture and delivery submission.
user_flows: Navigate to /unloader -> View progress bar and stats (Deliveries Today / Points / Streak) -> Click "Log New Delivery" button -> Delivery stepper opens

Navigate to /unloader -> Click "Log New Delivery" button -> Device shows camera permission prompt -> Deny camera permission -> See error 'Camera access required' and fallback option to upload a photo from gallery

features.name: Delivery Detail (View, Verify, Export)
features.description: Manager/Admin view for a single delivery showing AI summary, extracted raw text, photos (click to expand), and an Export Delivery action that zips photos and summary for download. Also includes post-AI image compression to conserve Supabase storage.
user_flows: Navigate to /delivery/123 -> See AI summary at top (deliveries.ai_summary) -> See cropped photo gallery -> Click on a photo -> Photo opens expanded full-size view
Navigate to /delivery/123 -> Click Export Delivery button -> System sends POST /api/deliveries/export -> Browser downloads delivery_123.zip containing photos and ai_summary.txt

Unloader: Upload photos and submit delivery -> System uploads originals to Supabase bucket delivery-photos -> System calls /api/ai/scan -> Gemini extracts text -> System compresses images with sharp and overwrites original storage paths -> Manager navigates to /delivery/123 -> See compressed photos (reduced file sizes) and AI summary
Navigate to /delivery/123 -> Click Export Delivery button -> System sends POST /api/deliveries/export -> Server returns error -> Show error 'Export failed, try again' and keep UI responsive

routes.description: Admin dashboard with 3 tabs (Action Center, Deliveries, Materials)
Unloader gamified home and delivery input
Detailed view of a single delivery with photos and export

features.name: User Login
user_interactions: See error shake animation on invalid PIN

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Missing Docs
user_interactions: Click Resolve button on a missing document

features.name: Unloader Home
user_interactions: Click "Log New Delivery" button to open stepper

features.name: Delivery Detail
user_interactions: View AI summary, photos, and materials
Click on a photo to expand it
Click Export Delivery to download ZIP
